text: I like thinking about new ideas and deep topics.
I like looking at art, visiting museums, or listening to music.
I prefer to do the same routine every day instead of trying new things.
I can easily imagine clear stories and pictures in my mind.
I lose interest when people talk about complex theories that are not practical.
I enjoy finding creative and unusual ways to fix problems.
I care more about real facts than ideas and theories.
I want to learn about people from different countries and cultures.
I focus on real life rather than spending time daydreaming.
I easily notice and enjoy beauty in nature, art, or clever designs.
I keep my room, desk, and digital files clean and organized.
I often make choices quickly without making a plan first.
I notice small mistakes in my work that other people miss.
It is hard for me to follow a strict timetable or schedule.
I try my best to finish a project completely once I start it.
I regularly delay starting my work, even when it is important.
I set clear goals for myself and work hard to reach them.
I work too fast sometimes, which causes me to make mistakes.
I always arrive on time for meetings and plans with friends.
I think carefully about what will happen before I speak or act.
I feel full of energy after spending time with a big group of people.
I prefer to spend my free time alone in a quiet place.
I find it easy to start talking to people I do not know.
I naturally keep my thoughts and feelings to myself.
I enjoy being the person everyone looks at in a social group.
I am quiet and careful around people I just met.
I actively look for parties, events, or social gatherings to attend.
Spending a long time in crowded rooms tires me out.
I can make new friends very quickly.
I talk a lot when I am with my friends.
I spend time and effort to help others when they are having a hard time.
I use angry or harsh words when someone annoys me.
I easily understand how other people feel and feel sorry for them.
I usually believe that most people are good and honest.
I stay angry for a long time at people who treat me badly.
People say I am a good listener who truly cares about their lives.
I often find myself arguing or disagreeing with other people.
I often give up what I want just to keep the peace with others.
It is hard for me to care about problems that do not affect me.
I try to treat every person I meet with kindness and respect.
I feel completely stressed and panicked when I have too much pressure.
I stay calm and think clearly during an emergency or difficult crisis.
I worry a lot about bad things that might happen in the future.
My mood changes very fast from happy to sad or angry.
I have a stable, happy mood most of the time.
Small things make me feel frustrated or impatient very quickly.
I am happy with who I am and rarely worry about my flaws.
I feel nervous or worry about what other people think of me.
I forget about failures quickly and move forward without worrying.
When small plans change unexpectedly, it ruins my whole mood.
